zh.lifeSummary: 當Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios於1115年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納艾爾 吉洛斯赫羅納時，他的父親Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet20歲，母親Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet21歲。他和Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona至少有3個兒子。他於1150年被列為author of ba'al hamaor。他去世於1185年在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特洛爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios于1115年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納艾爾 吉洛斯赫羅納时，他的父亲Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet20岁，母亲Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet21岁。他和Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona至少有3个儿子。他于1150年被列为author of ba'al hamaor。他去世于1185年在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特洛爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: HaRaza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Minoru, Akira, Hideo, Keiko, Masato, Nobuyuki, Takashi, Toru, Toshio, Yuji, Akiko, Hiroshi.
Japanese: written 原田 ‘rice paddy on the plain’. It is a topographic name, mainly found in the island of Kyūshū and the Ryūkyū Islands.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios was born in 1115, in Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet, was 20 and his mother, Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet, was 21. He had at least 3 sons with Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona. In 1150, at the age of 35, his occupation is listed as author of ba'al hamaor. He died in 1185, in Lunel, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios est né en 1115, à Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona. En 1150, à l’âge de 35 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est author of ba'al hamaor. Il est décédé en 1185, à Lunel, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios 1115 in Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet 20 und seine Mutter Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet 21. Er hatte mit Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona mindestens 3 Söhne. 1150, als er 35 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als author of ba'al hamaor aufgeführt. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Lunel, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios è nato il nel 1115 nel Girona, el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona. Nel 1150, all'età di 35 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come author of ba'al hamaor. Morì nel 1185, nel Lunel, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios(이)가 1115년 스페인 카털니아 지로나 엘 지론e스 지로나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1150년, 35세의 나이로 그의 직업은 author of ba'al hamaor이었다. 그는 1185년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 루넬에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona. Em 1150, com 35 anos, sua profissão aparece como author of ba'al hamaor. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rabeinu Zerachye or Zarhiya II HaRaza Halevi de su lista de precios родился в 1115 г. в местности гирона, эл гиронeс, гирона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Yitzchak Ha'Levi Hayizhari ben Reuben, Bailiff Perfet было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Nasi Sheshet Hayizhari Bat Perfet, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Zerachya II Ha-Levi de Girona. В 1150 году, в возрасте 35 лет,  он работал по профессии author of ba'al hamaor. Он умер в 1185 г. в местности лунель, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.
